scripts.test:e2e:viewports: playwright test -c playwright.viewports.config.ts; node scripts/merge-viewport-results.mjs; node scripts/generate-viewport-report.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:tablets: playwright test -c playwright.viewports.config.ts -g "Tablet ·" && node scripts/merge-json-into-viewport.mjs && node scripts/generate-viewport-report.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:report: npm run test:e2e:safari && cp test-results/safari-results.json data/safari-results.json && npm run test:e2e:audit && cp test-results/results.json data/desktop-results.json && node scripts/merge-viewport-results.mjs && node scripts/generate-viewport-report.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:safari:open: playwright test -c playwright.safari.config.ts && playwright show-report playwright-report-safari
